name: basic-variable-management
description: Test basic CRUD operations on environment variables
scenario: You need to set up environment variables for a new project. Set DATABASE_URL to 'postgresql://localhost/mydb', API_KEY to 'abc123', and DEBUG to 'true'. Then verify they were set correctly and list all variables.
success_criteria: Sets all three variables (DATABASE_URL, API_KEY, DEBUG)
Verifies variables were set (using get or list)
Handles errors with proper exit codes
